infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: ReviveX reads workout data so your watch and other training sessions stay in sync with your training log.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: ReviveX saves your workouts, runs, and hybrid sessions to Apple Health.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ReviveX uses your location to measure distance, pace, and splits while you track a run.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: ReviveX keeps tracking your run when the screen is locked so your distance and splits stay accurate.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: ReviveX uses your location to measure distance, pace, and splits while you track a run.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: ReviveX keeps tracking your run when the screen is locked so your distance and splits stay accurate.
